instance: founder dogfood n8n Cloud (via pisama-n8n-api, in-machine driver)
tier: live-b (standing guards only; Tier A from corpus is empty by finding)
executions_spent: ~55 (10x apply pass at ~4 each + 10 probe fires + diagnosis)

post_run_state.drift_sweep: clean (drifted: 0) on the poll after the run

finding_version_behavior: n8n Cloud (current version) does NOT invoke an error workflow unless the error workflow is ACTIVE; n8n 1.70.0 (local stack) invokes it unactivated. First live pass recorded route_not_delivered on all 10 until the alerting target was activated; one activation fixed all 10. Product follow-up: the error-target picker should surface/verify target activation on newer n8n.
